name: Chandni Fabric Jhumka
description: Moonlit fabric jhumkas with hand-embroidered cotton petals and freshwater pearl drops. Each pair is stitched over three days — layered, knotted, and finished by a single artisan so the sway feels almost breathing.
shortDescription: Embroidered cotton jhumkas with pearl drops
careInstructions: Store in the provided cotton pouch. Avoid perfume directly on fabric. Spot clean only.
comfort: Lightweight cotton construction with soft backing — comfortable for all-day wear.
packaging: Arrives in a hand-stitched cotton pouch with tissue wrap.

process.title: Sketch & silhouette
process.description: The bell curve is drawn freehand on butter paper — no two pairs are identical by design.

process.title: Embroidery
process.description: Cotton petals are embroidered with satin stitch and French knots over two days.

process.title: Pearl finishing
process.description: Pearls are knotted onto silk thread; each jhumka is weighed for balanced sway.

name: Meera Pearl Choker
description: A close-fitting choker of miniature pearls strung on silk thread with a central embroidered medallion drawn from our logo. It sits at the collarbone like a whispered compliment.
careInstructions: Lay flat when storing. Keep away from moisture.
comfort: Silk-lined closure sits flat against the neck without pinching.
packaging: Hung on a cotton-covered card inside a reusable pouch.

process.title: Pearl selection
process.description: Pearls are matched for lustre and size across forty centimetres of strand.

process.title: Medallion embroidery
process.description: The centre motif is embroidered on cotton and backed with soft felt.

process.title: Stringing
process.description: Silk thread is waxed and knotted between each pearl for durability and drape.

name: Gulmohar Thread Kada
description: A hinged fabric cuff with embroidered gulmohar blooms along the band — flame-tree red thread on natural cotton. Opens with a concealed fabric clasp so the floral story stays uninterrupted.
careInstructions: Avoid impact on embroidery. Store flat in cotton pouch.
comfort: Padded cotton interior — no rigid edges against the wrist.
packaging: Wrapped in tissue inside a cotton drawstring pouch.

process.title: Band forming
process.description: Cotton is layered and stitched to thickness for wrist comfort.

process.title: Embroidery
process.description: Each petal is filled with running stitch and satin thread over two sessions.

process.title: Clasp fitting
process.description: The hidden fabric hinge is tested for five hundred open-close cycles.

name: Noor Thread Haar
description: A long strand of graduated pearl stations linked by cotton cord — light enough to wear from morning chai to midnight dessert. Named for the glow it leaves along the neckline.
careInstructions: Store hung vertically. Detangle gently with fingers, never a brush.
comfort: Lightweight cord construction — no metal weight on the neck.
packaging: Coiled in tissue within a cotton travel pouch.

process.title: Station layout
process.description: Pearl stations are arranged on velvet to perfect the graduation curve.

process.title: Linking
process.description: Each station is knotted onto waxed cotton cord for security without bulk.

process.title: Quality check
process.description: The haar is draped on a bust form and inspected for symmetry under warm light.

name: Sitar Thread Bracelet
description: Silk thread twisted like sitar strings, capped with miniature wooden bead charms. A conversation piece for musicians and dreamers alike.
careInstructions: Keep dry. Store coiled in cotton pouch.
comfort: Soft tie closure — no metal against skin.
packaging: Coiled and tucked into a small cotton sachet.

process.title: Thread twisting
process.description: Silk thread is twisted by hand to mimic the resonance pattern of sitar strings.

process.title: Bead threading
process.description: Wooden beads are threaded and secured with hidden knots.

process.title: Sizing
process.description: Finished with an adjustable cotton tie for wrist sizes 5.5–7 in.

name: Raag Brooch
description: A textile jewellery brooch — zari thread embroidered on silk with a cotton-backed pin. Designed to anchor a dupatta fold or brighten a lapel.
careInstructions: Spot clean only. Pin through sturdy fabric layers.
comfort: Lightweight — sits flat without pulling fabric.
packaging: Pinned to a cotton card inside a small pouch.

process.title: Silk mounting
process.description: Silk is stretched on an embroidery frame and stabilised with cotton backing.

process.title: Zari embroidery
process.description: Motifs are stitched in running zari with a single needle over two days.

process.title: Pin assembly
process.description: A secure pin back is covered with felt to protect fabric.

name: Gajra Hair Pin
description: A silk-thread gajra wound around a cotton-wrapped hair pin — jasmine-scented thread optional on request. For braids, buns, and the last touch before stepping out.
careInstructions: Store in a dry place. Fluff gently before wearing.
comfort: Lightweight pin with rounded cotton tip — gentle on the scalp.
packaging: Tucked into a slim cotton sleeve.

process.title: Thread winding
process.description: Silk thread is wound in tight coils to mimic fresh gajra fullness.

process.title: Pin fitting
process.description: The cotton-wrapped pin is inserted through the coil core and secured.

process.title: Scenting
process.description: Optional jasmine essence is applied sparingly to thread ends.

name: Cotton Pearl Studs
description: Petite cotton-wrapped studs with freshwater pearl centres — everyday pieces that still feel considered. Hypoallergenic posts for sensitive ears.
careInstructions: Wipe after wear. Store in cotton pouch.
packaging: Pair tucked into a mini cotton pouch.

process.title: Cotton wrapping
process.description: Cotton is wound tightly around stud bases for a soft matte finish.

process.title: Pearl setting
process.description: Pearls are secured with silk thread — no glue, no metal bezels.

process.title: Post testing
process.description: Hypoallergenic posts are tested for nickel content before shipping.

name: Sangam Bangle Set
description: A set of three thin cotton-wrapped bangles with hand-embroidered texture — named for the confluence of rivers, meant to be worn stacked or shared among sisters.
careInstructions: Keep dry. Store stacked in cotton pouch.
comfort: Flexible cotton construction — no rigid metal.
packaging: Set of three nested in a cotton roll.

process.title: Bangle forming
process.description: Cotton cord is shaped into three matching circumferences.

process.title: Embroidery texture
process.description: Each bangle receives hand embroidery for organic shimmer.

process.title: Set matching
process.description: Bangles are grouped by weight and tone before packaging as a set.

name: Vardaan Embroidered Tikka
description: A forehead piece with a central embroidered cotton teardrop and fine thread sides — adjustable for different parting widths. Hand-stitched, not cast.
careInstructions: Store flat. Handle thread chains delicately to avoid kinks.
comfort: Soft cotton backing — no metal against the forehead.
packaging: Laid flat in tissue within a cotton envelope.

process.title: Teardrop embroidery
process.description: The central cotton teardrop is embroidered with satin stitch for stability.

process.title: Chain measurement
process.description: Side chains are cut to adjustable lengths with cotton micro ties.

process.title: Fit testing
process.description: Tested on multiple head forms for comfortable forehead contact.
